content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt calls this a "public beta" and warns of "rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2), implying an unfinished build.
Pierre: Apple reviewers may reject or question builds that self-describe as beta software, since App Store releases must be presented as finished products (TestFlight is the proper channel for beta labeling). Your release notes explicitly say "public beta" and "expect rough edges," which contradicts this. Rewrite the notes to describe finished, shipped features (e.g. "Improved sync reliability") without beta/testing language.
